headline: Shares of companies in the broader industrial space are trading higher amid overall market strength as stocks rebound following recent weakness. Stocks have been highly volatile following the Fed's recent rate hike.

headline: Stocks Erase Early Gains as Chipmakers Turn Lower
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is down -0.28%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.19%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is down -0.80%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are down -0.25%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...
